title: micranthus longifolius
intro: Micranthus longifolius, also known as the long-leaved micranthus, is a flowering plant species within the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Micranthus longifolius include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing pain relief. Herbal preparations of Micranthus longifolius include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns.
